faqs.a: No. The Intro is for platonic, professional, and creative connections — co-founders, collaborators, mentors, friends. If romance happens, that's between you and them.

faqs.q: How do you decide who to introduce me to?
faqs.a: Each match is hand-picked by us based on your profile — your work, interests, energy, and what kind of person you'd find interesting this week.
We're starting with Melbourne because it's where we live, where we know the cafés, and where we can keep the curation tight. Other cities will come later.
Founding cohort members pay nothing during the first season. Pricing for future cohorts will be announced before applications open.

faqs.q: What if the person you send me isn't a good fit?
faqs.a: Tell us. We learn from every signal and refine future matches. You can also pass on any week — see below.

faqs.q: Can I pause or skip a week?
faqs.a: Yes. Reply to any intro email with 'skip' or 'pause' and we'll hold off until you're ready.

faqs.q: Do you share my profile with anyone?
faqs.a: Only with the person we introduce you to that week, and only what's relevant. Your full profile is never published or browsable.

faqs.q: When does the founding cohort start?
faqs.a: May 2026. Applications close once we hit 50 members.
